_comment: Example Context Auto Builder config. Copy this file to `<VAULT>/00_Buffer/00.05_Profile/contexts_config.json` (or wherever your contexts_auto_builder points) and customize. See docs/CONTEXTS_AUTO_DESIGN.md for the full schema.

auto_profile_files._comment: Strategy 1 (zero-config): every file matching `**/*__profile.md` in your vault becomes one context card automatically. Name a pinned note `<topic>__profile.md` (two underscores before `profile`) and the builder picks it up on its next scan.

aggregations._comment: Strategy 2 (glob-merge): merge several __profile.md files into ONE context card. Useful when the user has multiple themed pinned notes that conceptually form a single 'all my X' surface. The `extra_trigger_tags` list teaches the Filter when to inject this combined card.
aggregations.name: projects_overview

aggregations._comment: Example: aggregate active learning threads across domains.
aggregations.name: current_learning

profile_file_overrides._comment: Strategy 3 (per-file tag boost): add extra trigger tags to a SINGLE __profile.md card. The key is the card's slugified topic stem (the filename without `__profile.md`). Use this when the auto-extracted tags (from filename, table columns, frontmatter tags) are too narrow.

profile_key_cards._comment: Strategy 4 (structured-profile pull): extract specific sections from a single master profile markdown file into their own small context cards. Useful when one long profile note has sections the user queries separately.

global_settings._comment: Apply to all cards regardless of strategy.
